working_on.task: Saved project memory after implementing and splitting multi-CV, language, and work history changes into clean commits
working_on.notes: Feature is implemented and verified. Changes were split into commits e81e65c and 506413b. The next session can continue with manual browser QA or the next planned feature.

pending_tasks.task: Manual browser review of candidate detail tabs and candidate upload flow on real UI
Decide whether to retire legacy /api/candidates/[id]/cv after full migration to CandidateCV
Consider changing DATABASE_URL sslmode to verify-full to match the pg warning

recent_changes.description: Added CandidateCV, CandidateLanguage, WorkExperience and applied Prisma migration add-cv-language-experience
Upgraded candidate detail page with tabs for multi-CV, languages, and work history, and added candidate language filtering
Seeded demo CV, language, and work history data and refreshed architecture, codebase map, and plan docs
Split DB optimization into two clean commits and saved handover context

decisions_made.decision: Keep Candidate.cvFileUrl and Candidate.cvFileName synchronized with the primary CandidateCV
decisions_made.reason: The old viewer and legacy flows can keep working while the new CandidateCV model rolls out

decisions_made.decision: Store languages in CandidateLanguage relation rows instead of a String[] field on Candidate
decisions_made.reason: Language level and certificate must be stored alongside the language name

decisions_made.decision: Use public stable PDF URLs in seed data instead of checking binary CV files into the repo
decisions_made.reason: Demo preview works without adding binary assets to version control

decisions_made.decision: Split the implementation into code/data and docs/context commits
decisions_made.reason: History stays easier to review and future cherry-picking is safer

verification.command: npx eslint prisma/seed.ts and changed candidate detail files
